describe.confidence_note: Thorough describe with clear decomposition, design questions identified, vault references included. Carried from prior session.

specify.confidence_note: Clear schema design, all 5 design questions answered, work units well-decomposed. Success criteria from ambiguity gate gap now addressed. Prism findings-summary deferred to implementation.

challenge.confidence_note: Elder converged at 0.88. 9 findings (1 critical, 2 high, 3 medium, 2 low, 1 medium from vault). Architecture validated by 8 vault findings. No regression needed.

edge_cases.confidence_note: Elder converged at 0.91. 30 boundaries → 5 genuine gaps, 5 acceptable risks, 20 declined. All triage historically validated. No regression needed.

premortem.confidence_note: 5 NEW operational findings (PM1-PM3, PM6-PM7), 2 COVERED. Low overlap (0.29) confirms different failure class. PM1 critical — reinforces F1 as load-bearing.

review.skip_reason: Family debate (10 agents) + pre-mortem provided comprehensive coverage. Three independent lenses converged on F1. External review unlikely to surface new critical findings.

test.confidence_note: 26 test specs across 6 categories. Categories A-B automatable in test.sh. Categories C-F behavioral — require manual verification or eval fixtures. D1-D2 highest value (validate F1/G1/G2).

ambiguity_gate.notes: Success criteria gap — tighten acceptance criteria in Stage 2
